Brunch and Cocktails | The Vick
top of page
Brunch and Cocktails
Classics
Avocado Toast
House made avocado spread, diced tomatoes, with feta cheese on whole wheat toast (with egg $16)
$12
Biscuits & Gravy
Smothered and covered with homemade pork sausage gravy (with egg $17)
$13
French Toast Sticks
Cinnamon and powdered sugar with maple syrup
$12
Fruit and Granola Yogurt Parfait
Vanilla yogurt, honey oat granola, and seasonal berries
$9
Traditional Plate
Your choice of breakfast meat, two eggs, grits or potatoes, toast or english muffin +2 biscuits +2 bagel with cream cheese
$16
Handhelds
served with potatoes or grits (add fruit for $4)
Classic Sandwich
Bacon, egg, cheddar cheese with onion jam, and siracha mayo, on buttered brioche bun
$13
BLT
Thick cut bacon, lettuce, and tomato with mayo on sliced brioche (with egg $17)
$13
Buffalo Chicken Wrap
Fried chicken, buffalo sauce, blue cheese crumbles, lettuce, tomato, with buffalo ranch
$15
Energizer
Turkey bacon, egg, goat cheese, tomato, arugula, avocado spread on an everything bagel
$15
JR's Breakfast Sandwich
Pan seared sausage, American cheese, and egg topped with chalula honey on an english muffin
$13
Smash Burger
Two smashed sirloin patties, American cheese, pepper relish, mayo, lettuce, with fries
$17
Favorites
Benedicts
Ham, toasted english muffin topped with homemade hollandaise (additional $5 with Maryland crabcake - additional $5 with smoked salmon)
$18
Chicken & Waffles
Fried chicken tenders and mini waffles with a side of maple syrup and cholulah honey
$16
Shrimp & Grits
Six jumbo cajun shrimp with cream sauce on homestyle grits (with chopped bacon $18)
$17
Specialty Omelets
Your choice of grits, breakfast potatoes, toast or english muffin (additional $4 with fresh fruit)
Veggie - spinach, bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, tomatoes, and swiss cheese
Meat Lovers - ham, bacon, sausage, and cheddar cheese
Goat Cheese - two egg omelet stuffed with goat cheese
$16
Specialty
Crispy Potato Bowl
Classic Breakfast - includes potatoes, scrambled eggs, shredded cheese, and sausage or bacon
Philly Style - potatoes, shredded sirloin beef with onions, bell peppers, and provolone cheese (with eggs $20)
Veggie Style - house potatoes, scrambled eggs, sautéed veggies, and goat cheese
$16
Fried Chicken Salad
Mixed greens, tomatoes, shredded cheese, bacon, candied pecans, topped with fried chicken tenders
$16
Lamb & Eggs
Four lamp lollipops topped with balsamic glaze, two eggs of any style, and your choice of grits or potatoes
$32
Steak & Eggs
10oz New York strip, two eggs any style, & your choice of grits or potatoes
$39
